user.title: Dynamic Energy Contract Calculator
user.description: Configure price settings and load supplier presets. Energy sources are added as sub-entries after setup.

data.action: Select option: Load Preset, Price Settings, Network Tariff Settings, or Finish

load_preset.title: Load Supplier Preset
load_preset.description: Select a predefined supplier configuration to automatically set all price parameters. Choose 'Zonneplan 2026' to load Zonneplan contract terms, or 'None' to keep current settings.

data.reset_on_contract_anniversary: Reset all meters on contract anniversary

load_network_tariff_preset.title: Load Network Tariff Preset (2029)
load_network_tariff_preset.description: Select a Dutch grid operator (netbeheerder) preset to automatically fill in indicative 2029 time-of-use network tariff rates. Values are INDICATIVE — verify with your grid operator before 2029. All rates are exclusive of VAT.

network_tariff.title: Network Tariff Settings (tijdsafhankelijk nettarief 2029)
network_tariff.description: Configure time-dependent network tariffs. Peak period applies on weekdays between the configured hours. Winter season is defined by start and end month (wraps year boundary). All rates are exclusive of VAT.

user.title: Dynamic Energy Contract Calculator
user.description: Update price settings and supplier presets. Energy sources are managed as sub-entries.

data.action: Select option: Load Preset, Price Settings, Network Tariff Settings, or Finish

load_preset.title: Load Supplier Preset
load_preset.description: Select a predefined supplier configuration to automatically set all price parameters. Choose 'Zonneplan 2026' to load Zonneplan contract terms, or 'None' to keep current settings.

data.reset_on_contract_anniversary: Reset all meters on contract anniversary

load_network_tariff_preset.title: Load Network Tariff Preset (2029)
load_network_tariff_preset.description: Select a Dutch grid operator (netbeheerder) preset to automatically fill in indicative 2029 time-of-use network tariff rates. Values are INDICATIVE — verify with your grid operator before 2029. All rates are exclusive of VAT.

network_tariff.title: Network Tariff Settings (tijdsafhankelijk nettarief 2029)
network_tariff.description: Configure time-dependent network tariffs. Peak period applies on weekdays between the configured hours. Winter season is defined by start and end month (wraps year boundary). All rates are exclusive of VAT.

user.title: Add energy source
user.description: Select the type of energy source to track.

select_sources.title: Select sensors
select_sources.description: Select the energy sensors to track for this source.

reconfigure.title: Edit energy source
reconfigure.description: Update the source type and sensors for this energy source.

reset_all_meters.name: Reset all meters
reset_all_meters.description: Reset all dynamic energy meters to 0.

reset_selected_meters.name: Reset selected meters
reset_selected_meters.description: Reset only the specified entity_ids to 0.

entity_ids.name: Entity IDs
entity_ids.description: List of sensor entity_ids to reset.

set_meter_value.name: Set meter value
set_meter_value.description: Manually set the value of a meter.

value.name: Value
value.description: The new value for the sensor.

set_netting.name: Set netting
set_netting.description: Enable or disable netting (salderingsregeling). Reloads the integration to apply the change.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether netting should be enabled or disabled.

set_netting_value.name: Set netting value
set_netting_value.description: Manually set the netting net consumption value in kWh. Negative means solar credit.

value.name: Value
value.description: Net consumption in kWh. Positive = net consumer, negative = net producer (credit).

energy_source_unavailable.title: Energy source unavailable
energy_source_unavailable.description: Energy sensor {sensor} is unavailable or has invalid data.

price_sensor_unavailable.title: Price sensor unavailable
price_sensor_unavailable.description: Price sensor {sensor} is unavailable or has invalid data.
